ValidationRule.description: Restrict product available if expertise "Investment Solution" is chosen as expertise
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c),AND(INCLUDES( Expertise_picklist__c ,"Investment Solutions"), OR( INCLUDES(Product2__c ,"AXA Selection CC"), INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Darta"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Inversis"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Mapfre JA"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Mediolanum CGSS"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Nomura"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Sagis"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Salix"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"UFF GE"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"ALM ES I"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"ALM ES CPE"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Avenir Sélection Patrimoine"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Eres & Carmignac Patrimoine"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Eres Carmignac Equilibre"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"MACSF CP"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Multimanagers Actions Internationales – C"),INCLUDES(Product2__c,"Multimanagers Equilibre – CP"))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Some products you selected can not be chosen if expertise "Investment Solution" is chosen as Expertise.
